accounting_source_of_truth.rule: Approved trusted ledger rows are accounting truth. Parsed PO/email rows are operational evidence until finance reviews or imports trusted ledger data.

schedule.next_day_goal: Users can review PO revenue evidence the next morning.

fallbacks.handling: Parse XLSX and stage PO evidence.

fallbacks.condition: PDF exists but XLSX is missing
fallbacks.handling: Keep for manual review; do not auto-post revenue.
Route to review and do not create a normal revenue draft.

rules.accepted_gap_rule: If a day is missing from Thuy email evidence but exists in the trusted April ledger, accept it as ledger-only for accounting truth instead of treating it as parser failure.
rules.posting_rule: Line-level parser output is manual revenue evidence only; Quản lý doanh thu/trusted ledger controls accounting revenue.

quantity_policy.sent_qty: Quantity parsed from Gmail text body/order evidence.
quantity_policy.sold_qty: Quantity accepted from trusted ledger/accounting reconciliation.
quantity_policy.accounting_rule: Do not treat sent_qty as sold_qty when inventory or unsold deltas exist.

rules.t4_inventory_note: T4 reconciliation includes a 662 bánh inventory/unsold delta; preserve this as inventory context and keep trusted ledger sold_qty as accounting truth.

storage_policy: Keep these rule outputs/configs in repo during trial period. Do not move to app KB/customer CRM until approved.
